metric_name: Weekly PC market trend commentary
metric_value: Here Today, Gone Tomorrow We do a lot of online shopping in order to bring our PC Deals to you. Unfortunately, we can't be at the console 24x7, which is what really is necessary to keep tabs on this industry.
notes: Kastner market assessment for week of 2003-03-02

metric_name: BestBuy: buying tips for week of 2003-03-02
metric_value: Get $100 mail-in rebate for all computer packages (bundled deals) this week at BestBuy stores. BestBuy.com still offers free shipping and, now, no financing for 24 months.

metric_name: Circuit City: buying tips for week of 2003-03-02
metric_value: This week, get $100-$200 off all Pentium 4 processor systems and no interest for 12 months at Circuit City. Circuitcity.com has reintroduced free shipping for a limited time on all its online items.

metric_name: CompUSA: buying tips for week of 2003-03-02
metric_value: CompUSA.com tends to continue selling "older" PC models after BestBuy.com and CircuitCity.com have removed them, like the HP 763n in this week's PC Deals. This means you can get great deals on models that retailers want off the shelves to make room for the newer versions.

metric_name: EMachines: buying tips for week of 2003-03-02
metric_value: EMachines has new models out. Check out BestBuy's bundled deals on these new machines.

metric_name: Dell: buying tips for week of 2003-03-02
metric_value: Dell's online deals include $50 instant savings on the 4550 and $150 savings on the 8250 series, free memory upgrades, and, for the first time that we can remember, monitor upgrades. These deals caused Dell's prices to go down.

metric_name: Gateway: buying tips for week of 2003-03-02
metric_value: Gateway offers free shipping again. Gateway revamped its website and has severely cut back on PC models for the home.

metric_name: Sony: buying tips for week of 2003-03-02
metric_value: Sony Online has introduced new models at competitive prices. It appears that prices have risen slightly this week, but there are still great deals to be found.

metric_name: HP and Compaq: buying tips for week of 2003-03-02
metric_value: HP Online continues to be competitive with retail deals, but the resurgence of weekly offers means that your best bundled deals are at stores like CompUSA. HP Online does offer free shipping as well $1 CD-RW and $99 17" monitors when purchasing a customized PC.

metric_name: Desktop PC: positioning in week of 2003-03-02
metric_value: Right now, get free shipping on all Viao desktops, including customized models.

metric_name: DDR SDRAM: positioning in week of 2003-03-02
metric_value: This commentary comes to mind after we configured a Dell 4550 with a 2.8 GHz Pentium 4, 256MB fast DDR memory, 60GB hard drive, DVD and CD-RW, and a free 17" monitor.

metric_name: LCD Flat Panel Monitor: positioning in week of 2003-03-02
metric_value: The World if Flat - Flat Panels, That Is We've mentioned this recently, but we'll say it again because PC Deals is so impressed with the pricing of LCD flat-panel monitors.
